title: Tech layoffs have picked up. Expect more.
snippet: According to Layoffs.fyi, 81,272 tech employees have been laid off so far in 2026.

title: Brands pushed Indians to buy premium phones. Now, they’re paying a price
snippet: India’s smartphone market is hitting a premiumization ceiling as upgrade cycles stretch to nearly 48 months, driven by higher prices, durable devices and longer software support.

title: Mirae Asset to lead Krafton, Naver’s  ₹6,000 cr bet on India’s early-growth-stage tech startups
snippet: The new fund marks a significant investment trend from Asian firms seeking to capitalize on India's evolving startup ecosystem.

title: Redmi A7 and Redmi A7 Pro launched in India, price starts at  ₹10,499
snippet: Xiaomi launched the Redmi A7 and A7 Pro in India, featuring high-refresh rate displays and large batteries. The A7 is priced at Rs. 10,999 while the A7 Pro is priced at Rs. 11,999 respectively

title: South Korea's Krafton, Naver partner Mirae for  ₹6,000 crore India fund to back growth-stage tech startups
snippet: The Unicorn Growth Fund has been launched to support Indian tech startups, emphasizing sectors like digital marketplaces and AI, reflecting significant Asian investment in India.

title: iPhone 17 Pro Max vs iPhone 18 Pro Max: New colours, processor, camera and expected upgrades
snippet: Apple is expected to unveil the iPhone 18 Pro Max in September. Here's a look at all the changes that Cupertino based tech giant could be planning for the upcoming flagship device.

title: Google taps Sergey Brin to lead a specialized AI strike team to take on Anthropic's Claude: Report
snippet: Google is assembling a 'Coding Strike Team' led by co-founder Sergey Brin to enhance its AI coding capabilities and compete with Anthropic's Claude AI. The initiative aims for self-improving AI models, with plans for major announcements at the upcoming I/O conference.

title: Apple to soon let you unlock and start Tata car directly from your iPhone or Apple Watch: Report
snippet: Apple plans to add support car key features for Tata EV vehicles, according to a new report. The feature allows users to unlock and start their cars via iPhone or Apple Watch.&nbsp;

title: WhatsApp Plus is coming: Meta confirms new subscription, price leaked in new report
snippet: Meta is testing WhatsApp Plus subscription. The new premium tier will allow users to set custom app icons, ringtones, and expand chat features. The subscription is currently &nbsp;available to beta testers on Android with plans for iOS likely to follow soon.

title: Meta breaks ground on over $1 billion data center in Oklahoma's Tulsa
snippet: Meta Platforms is constructing a massive $1 billion data centre in Tulsa, Oklahoma, to boost its AI infrastructure. This investment will create over 1,000 construction jobs and 100 operational roles, marking Meta's first facility in the state. The project underscores the company's aggressive push in

title: Microsoft must face $2.8 billion UK lawsuit over cloud computing licences
snippet: A London tribunal has allowed a mass lawsuit against Microsoft. Thousands of British businesses claim they were overcharged for Windows Server software. This software was used on cloud services from Amazon, Google, and Alibaba. The case, valued at up to $2.8 ​billion, will now proceed to trial.

title: Infosys weighs CEO change; Groww's Lalit Keshre on next growth bets
snippet: Happy Wednesday! Infosys is set to discuss CEO Salil Parekh's tenure and a succession roadmap as it reports Q4 results. This and more in today's ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: Vodafone offers small businesses cybersecurity, AI capability with Google tie-up
snippet: Vodafone is partnering with Google Cloud to bring advanced cybersecurity and AI to small businesses. It will launch in Germany, in compliance with ​the region's stringent data protection ⁠standards, before ‌rolling out across additional European ​markets ​later this year, it said.

title: SpaceX says it has option to acquire startup Cursor for $60 billion
snippet: SpaceX is exploring a significant move into AI developer tools by securing an option to acquire code-generation startup Cursor for $60 billion or partner for $10 billion. title: Art of AI war: Sarvam to boost defence prowess
snippet: India is boosting its defence capabilities with a new Rs 300 crore Centre of Excellence for artificial intelligence. Homegrown labs like Sarvam are in talks with the defence ministry. title: Immigrants in a spot as US looks to vet old green card approvals
snippet: USCIS director Joseph B Edlow this weekend said the agency will reopen old cases to vet Biden-era green cards for fraud. This comes amid tighter scrutiny of issuance of green cards and a rise in denial rates.

snippet: Embedded in the body’s mucosal surfaces, proteins called lectins bind to sugars found on cell surfaces. title: Early life may have breathed oxygen earlier than believed
snippet: Around 2.3 billion years ago, a pivotal period known as the Great Oxidation Event set the evolutionary course for oxygen-breathing life on Earth. title: Analog computing from waste heat
snippet: Heat generated by electronic devices is usually a problem, but a team led by Giuseppe Romano, a research scientist at MIT’s Institute for Soldier Nanotechnologies, has found a way to use it for data processing that doesn’t rely on electricity.
